column1: Complications to trial and issues arising in free text

Discrepancy between french protocol document and registry entry.
Subjective statement ('good') that isn't justified or explained.
Addition of 6 month mortality (many other outcomes were monitored at this point)
This paper demonstrates good methods of flagging non-pre-specified outcomes, e.g. 'Although it was not a prespecified outcome, we analyzed hospital length of stay'.
